description: IIS Web Server monitoring dashboard. Displays request rates, error rates, active connections, throughput, service health, and W3C access logs for all monitored IIS servers. Metrics sourced from Grafana Alloy via prometheus.exporter.windows iis collector. Logs sourced from Loki via W3C access log file collection.

options.content: IIS Web Server monitoring. Request rates, error ratios (4xx/5xx), active connections, and throughput per IIS site. Filter by hostname to isolate a specific web server.

panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across all IIS sites on selected servers.
panels.title: Total Requests/sec

panels.description: Percentage of HTTP requests returning 5xx server error status codes across selected IIS servers.
panels.title: 5xx Error Rate

panels.description: Total active HTTP connections across all IIS sites on selected servers.
panels.title: Active Connections

panels.description: Total network throughput (sent + received) across all IIS sites on selected servers.
panels.title: Total Throughput

panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by IIS site. Shows traffic distribution across hosted sites.

targets.expr: sum by (hostname, site) (iis:site_requests:rate5m{environment=~"$environment", datacenter=~"$datacenter", hostname=~"$hostname", site=~"$site"})

panels.title: Request Rate by Site

panels.description: HTTP request rate broken down by HTTP status code class. Healthy traffic is predominantly 2xx with minimal 4xx/5xx.
panels.title: Request Rate by Status Class

panels.description: 5xx server error rate over time per IIS server. Sustained rates above 5% trigger the IisHighErrorRate alert.
panels.title: 5xx Error Rate Over Time

panels.description: 4xx client error rate over time per IIS server. Elevated 4xx rates may indicate broken links, misconfigured clients, or scanning activity.
panels.title: 4xx Error Rate Over Time

panels.description: Active HTTP connections per IIS site over time. Sustained high connection counts may indicate connection leaks or traffic spikes.
panels.title: Active Connections by Site

panels.description: Network throughput (sent + received) per IIS site. Identifies bandwidth-heavy sites and traffic patterns.
panels.title: Throughput by Site

panels.description: State of IIS core Windows services. W3SVC (World Wide Web Publishing) and WAS (Windows Process Activation) must be running for IIS to serve requests. IISADMIN manages IIS configuration. WMSVC enables remote IIS management.
panels.title: IIS Service Status

panels.description: Volume of W3C access log entries over time from IIS servers. Spikes may correlate with request rate changes or scanning activity.
panels.title: Access Log Volume

panels.description: Recent W3C access log entries from IIS servers. Filter by hostname and HTTP status code. Entries include request method, URI, status code, response time, and client IP.
panels.title: IIS Access Logs

title: IIS Web Server Overview
